/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -march=x86-64 -mtune=generic -O2 -pipe -fno-plt -fexceptions         -Wp,-D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=3 -Wformat -Werror=format-security         -fstack-clash-protection -fcf-protection         -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -Wp,-D_GLIBCXX_ASSERTIONS -g -ffile-prefix-map=/run/media/robin/robinScard/codingStuff/arch-unity7/pkgbuilds/x11-libs/dee-qt/src=/usr/src/debug/dee-qt -flto=auto -fvisibility=hidden -Wall -Wundef -std=c++0x -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/dee-qt5.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libdee-qt5.so.3 -o libdee-qt5.so.3.0.0 "CMakeFiles/dee-qt5.dir/dee-qt5_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dee-qt5.dir/deelistmodel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dee-qt5.dir/variantconversions.cpp.o"  /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.18 -L/usr/lib -ldee-1.0 -lgthread-2.0 -pthread -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0
